# Transcript
TIMOKRATHS ARISTAGOROY SHMACIDHS
IQMONIKOS ANTISQENEIDOY BERENI**DHS
QEOGNIS DHMHTRIOY ACARNEYS
TIMWN TIMOLOCOY PAIANIEYS
KLEARATOS DIONYSIOY LAMPTREYS
GRAMMATEYS KLHRWTOS
DIODOTOS QEODWROY AMAXANTEYS
GRAMMATEYS AIRETOS
TIMOGENHS AISCRIWNOS AFIDNAIOS
YPOGRAMMATEYS
ZWPYRIWN TECNWNOS PROBALISIOS
TOYSDE ESTEFANWSAN OI SYNARCONTES
TIMOKRATHN IQMONIKON
SHMACIDHN BERENIKIDHN
TON KLHRWTON OI ARCONTES
GRAMMATEA *ONAIRETON
DIODOTON GRAMMATEA
AMAXANTEA TIMOGENHN
AFIDNAION

# Lines: x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 x4 y4
368 556 4588 594
435 789 4579 792
412 994 4080 997
348 1148 3955 1192
339 1324 4595 1397
236 1532 3116 1618
326 1708 4115 1816
211 1916 2972 1960
342 2124 4275 2232
188 2287 2512 2386
284 2485 3932 2600
195 2754 4355 2860
681 3532 4192 3576
582 3708 4361 3752
588 5023 4214 5096
771 5234 4112 5228
848 5324 4067 5388
758 5432 3884 5525
2953 5669 4076 5640
